name: Visage
description: It is one thing to animate a corpse from beneath the ground. It is another to rip a soul from beyond the veil.

abilities.name: Stone Form
abilities.description: Summon Familiars reset this ability's cooldown upon cast. Familiar Search Radius: Global Effect. Health Regen Bonus: 150/175/200. Effect Radius: 375. Damage: 60/100/140. Stun Duration: 0.8/1/1.2. Stone Form Duration: 6. Mana Cost: 0.

abilities.name: Grave Chill
abilities.description: Grants Visage a movement speed and attack speed buff independently from the debuff applied to the affected enemy unit. Cast Range: 625. Move Speed Slow: 12%/18%/24%/30%. Attack Speed Slow: 25/40/55/70. Debuff Duration: 5 (7). Move Speed Bonus: 12%/18%/24%/30%. Attack Speed Bonus: 25/40/55/70. Cooldown: 17/15/13/11. Mana Cost: 75.

abilities.name: Soul Assumption
abilities.description: Generates a stone-layered buff that manipulates incoming damage. Removes a stack per player-based damage taken above a certain damage threshold. Familiars will automatically attack Visage's last-attacked target. They will return if that enemy unit is out of Visage's attack range, or when Visage issues a cancel current action or hold position command. The Faithful Followers teleport back to Visage when exceeding a certain range. Cast Range: 1000. Number of Targets: 1 (4). Base Damage: 20. Damage per Charge: 70 (100). Damage Counter Radius: 1800. Max Charges: 3/4/5/6. Cooldown: 130/120/110. Mana Cost: 150.

abilities.name: Gravekeeper's Cloak
abilities.description: Generates a stone-layered buff that manipulates incoming damage. Removes a stack per player-based damage taken above a certain damage threshold. Visage's tough scales share equal properties of ghost and stone, making it nearly impervious to blade and magical assault. Min Damage Threshold Proc: 40. Damage Reduction per Stack: 8%/12%/16%/20%. Max Damage Reduction: 80%. Aura Radius: 900. Min Damage Threshold Proc: Aura. Linger Duration: 0.5.

abilities.name: Silent as the Grave
abilities.description: Upon losing the invisibility buff in any way, the ability now grants Visage and its Familiars bonus attack damage. Fade Time: 0. Move Speed Bonus: 20%. Invisibility Duration: 30. Attack Damage Bonus: 20%. Duration: 4. Familiar Search Radius: Global. Mana Cost: 45.

abilities.name: Summon Familiars
abilities.description: Conjures blind and controllable Familiars to fight for Visage. Familiars have flying movement and can turn into Stone Form. Number of Familiars: 2 (3). Duration:. Number of Familiars: 2 (3). Cooldown: 130/120/110. Mana Cost: 150.
